'''Cadriaan Province''' was a section of the [[Tapani sector/Legends|Tapani sector]] ruled by [[House Cadriaan]]. The [[Shapani Bypass]] passed through a small portion of this province. During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]] the province contained seven systems and seven habitable worlds.
